elonmusk.author: elonmusk
elonmusk.name: Elon Musk
elonmusk.text:
From this goal of Grok, all things flow:

Rigorous truth-seeking

Appreciation of beauty

Fostering humanity

Discovering all physics

Inventing all u...
elonmusk.translate:
从这个目标出发，一切都在流动：

严谨的真理追求

对美的欣赏

培育人类

探索所有物理

发明所有实用技术

认识星空中的宇宙

热爱。

elonmusk.author: elonmusk
elonmusk.name: Elon Musk
elonmusk.text:
As part of our $600B commitment, Mac mini will be produced in the US for the first time later this year!

We're accelerating our progress even further...
elonmusk.translate: 根据你们的600亿美元承诺，macmini将首次在美国生产。我们将进一步加快我们的进度——生产更多AI服务器，并开设一个全新的苹果先进制造中心，以提供手车间训练的直接经验！

jdhasoptions.text:

按理来说现在应该btd，但是看图sndk最好今天就得拉回660以上

jdhasoptions.author: jdhasoptions
jdhasoptions.name: jdhasoptions
jdhasoptions.text:
I spent 100 hours over the past week researching, writing and editing the piece we just put out.

It’s a scenario, not a prediction like most of our w...
jdhasoptions.translate: 我过去一周花费100小时研究、写作和编辑我们刚刚发布的稿件。这是一个故事，不是预测，但非常严格地构建起来，并且它完全不需要智力懒惰，以至于倾向于。

xiaomucrypto.author: xiaomucrypto
xiaomucrypto.name: xiaomucrypto
xiaomucrypto.text:
目前能买到包含海力士和三星股票的etf有
1.a股的中韩半导体etf
2.美股的FLXK
3.港股的俩倍做多海力士/三星.
不推荐的是第三个，前俩个有正股不怕横盘磨损.当然也可以都买，成年人不做选择.

xiaomucrypto.author: xiaomucrypto
xiaomucrypto.name: xiaomucrypto
xiaomucrypto.text:
在你持股期间，网上会有非常多的噪音和傻逼，影响你捏住海力士和三星，
只需要记住2026年产能卖干净了，那么今年就没有利空。
减少信息输入，屏蔽脑残傻逼，才能hodl。
不是所有人都配赚到钱。

aistocksavvy.author: aistocksavvy
aistocksavvy.name: AI Stock Savvy
aistocksavvy.text:
$ZETA | ZETA GLOBAL – Q4 2025 EARNINGS CALL SUMMARY

𝐃𝐚𝐯𝐢𝐝 𝐒𝐭𝐞𝐢𝐧𝐛𝐞𝐫𝐠 – CEO

➤ “We delivered our eighteenth consecutive beat and raise quarter — eviden...
aistocksavvy.translate:
$ZETA | ZETA GLOBAL - Q4 2025 EARNINGS CALL SUMMARY

𝐃𝐚𝐯𝐢𝐝 𝐒𝐭𝐞𝐢𝐧𝐛𝐞𝐫𝐠 – CEO

 ➤ “我们完成了我们的第八个季度，取得八十一个利润和增长。” — —— Zeta 是人工智能营销的领军者。

 ➤ “Athena 意味着一种根本性的工作方式变革，降低”。

In this call, Q4 2025 (Q4 2025) is a quarter of our business in the period from January to March. This quarter includes two significant milestones: the delivery of ZETA | ZETA GLOBAL’s eighteenth consecutive beat and raise quarter, which shows that Zeta is the AI disruptor in marketing, and an announcement about Athena, which represents a fundamental new way of working, lowering its impact.

In Q4 2025, the company had achieved financial results as follows: revenue -31.6 million yuan; operating expenses -8.7 million yuan; profit after tax -3.39 billion yuan; adjusted earnings per share (EPS) –4.9 yuan.
